evidence.description: Dimension 1 named 'spec_fidelity' (canonical). CRIT-SF-001 requires executable assertions (not stubs) AND bun test exits 0; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-002. CRIT-SF-002 enumerates 11 Tier 1 PROPs (002,003,004,006,007,008,009,011,012,013,014); NC-SF-001 covers PROPs 015,016. All 17 REQ-FILTER-NNN are bounded by CRIT-SF-001 grep + bun test.

CRIT-EC-001 names all 28 EC IDs (EC-S-001..016, EC-T-001..005, EC-C-001..007) with grep+executable-assertion threshold; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-003. CRIT-EC-002 explicitly singles out EC-T-004 and EC-C-007 as guards for PROP-FILTER-022 and PROP-FILTER-024 race-freedom; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-004.

Dimension 3 added with six CRIT criteria, each binding a specific PROP and test file: CRIT-IC-001=PROP-005 (totality), CRIT-IC-002=PROP-010 (toLowerCase grep), CRIT-IC-003=PROP-014 (sort tiebreak EC-T-001), CRIT-IC-004=PROP-022 (debounce coalescing), CRIT-IC-005=PROP-023 (whitespace-only EC-S-002), CRIT-IC-006=PROP-024 (Esc EC-S-005). Resolves FIND-CONTRACT-005. NC-IC-001 references evidence/regression-baseline.json instead of hardcoded count of 1650; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-006.

Dimension 4 added with CRIT-SI-001 (computeVisible single-source-of-truth via grep allNoteIds.filter outside computeVisible.ts), CRIT-SI-002 (SearchInputChanged absent — PROP-021), CRIT-SI-003 (searchSortOf helper extracted, filterApplied removed). NC-SI-001 covers tsc compile. Resolves FIND-CONTRACT-007. Contract uses CRIT/NON-CRIT split; no pre-stamped status: PASS lines in body; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-008.

CRIT-VR-001 enumerates all 6 spec-listed forbidden APIs (setTimeout, Date.now, fetch, invoke, $state, $effect, $derived) plus stricter additions (Date(, new Date, Math.random) and binds the audit to feedReducer.ts; CRIT-VR-003 lists searchPredicate.ts, sortByUpdatedAt.ts, computeVisible.ts in PURE_MODULES; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-009. PROP-FILTER coverage map (lines 130-160) maps all 25 PROP-FILTER-001..025 to a CRIT or NON-CRIT criterion; CRIT-VR-002 covers PROP-020 hex/rgba audit; resolves FIND-CONTRACT-010.
